notes: noosd P2P edge bound end-to-end: NEW outbound gossip channel (supervisor OutboundGossip; consensus pushes admitted txs, produced blocks, and re-announces newly executed imports; p2p loop delivers via async P2pNetworkEdge::push_header/push_tx — previously announce_* existed but had no caller, so propagation only worked on the initial peer-ready pull). Fixed real import bug: blob lane serves the CANONICAL body encoding while the DA commitment is over the padded DA form; import now decodes BlockBodyV1 and re-derives da_form_bytes before shard-root comparison. Proven by crates/noos-node/src/tests/network_e2e.rs: two real supervisors over loopback QUIC — pull sync of a pre-existing block (handshake proof), tx push into the remote mempool, produced-block push propagation with exact head-hash equality and remote settlement, and a genesis-parameter-mutated node rejected at the identity handshake staying isolated. cargo test -p noos-node: 45 passed; clippy -D warnings clean.
